name: Domatosoupa Me Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the tinned tomatoes in a saucepan.
2. Add 1.8 liters of water.
3. Add the celery, onion, carrot, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add the wholemeal spaghetti pieces.
6. Serve when the spaghetti is cooked (about 10-15 minutes).
